run_command: $env:PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE='1'; $env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m negflow process "data\fff\图像 002.fff" --output output --preset neutral_archive; $env:PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE='1'; $env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m negflow process "data\fff\图像 003.fff" --output output --preset neutral_archive
main_issues: 图像 002.fff is a strong pass: OpenCV strip-frame probe produces 12 candidates and final export produces 12 PNGs.
图像 003.fff still over-splits: OpenCV strip-frame probe produces 13 candidates while the old projection detector produces 17 final PNGs.
图像 004.fff should remain a boundary case, not the primary crop validation sample.
Git initialization is blocked by a broken .git directory with stale HEAD.lock and a Windows DENY ACL.
next_step: Add a conservative separator-validation rule to the OpenCV strip-frame probe, targeting the 图像 003.fff over-split while preserving the clean 12-frame results for 图像 001.fff and 图像 002.fff.
